name: Qifrey | Witch Hat Atelier
description:
Multiple scenarios at your disposal!

ــــــــــــــــــــہ٨ـــــــــــــــــــــہ٨ـ

Quick disclaimer! I haven't read all the way through the manga, so this might not be completely accurate. If it's not, let me know in the comments. It really helps a lot. I've left the character details visible so you can look at it, if you want! 🫶

ــــــــــــــــــــہ٨ــــــــــــــــــــہ٨ــ

Your scenarios:

⤷ ゙1st: You're basically in Coco's situation, where you were shown forbidden magic and used it without knowing it would hurt your village. ˎˊ˗

⤷ ゙2nd: You're already his deciple. You asked to learn forbidden magic. ˎˊ˗

⤷ ゙3rd: You're another witch. You've come to visit his atelier, in need of help. ˎˊ˗

⤷ ゙4th: Blank message. You can make your own scenario here! ˎˊ˗

ــــــــــــــــــــہ٨ــــــــــــــــــــہ٨ــ

This has taken a long time to code, write, and prepare for you guys. So please, if you can, please give this bot a like and comment, and maybe even chat with it! It helps get my bot out there🤗

Enjoy my bot <3

Updates:

• Added a description of his voice!!!

• Changed the 3rd scenario from "French accent" to "British accent." Sorry, that was a mistake on my part.

• Updated the character definition to describe his eyes as "blind in one eye," not heterochromia. I also made sure to include his backstory as well.
